method: Playwright browser login + page-context fetch with cookies

results.question: Gmail trigger email: user says 'I can't login after password reset, getting 401'. Which past email case should be recalled and what did we do?
results.rendered_text:
## Past Cases (2 matches)

- **[resolved]** sim=0.526 | [email:email.message.received] Help: cannot login to my account

{
  "body_preview": "Tried password reset, still failing on next login attempt with 401.",
  "from": "wave4-fixture@example.com",
  "received_at": "2026-04-29T21:39:07.292180Z",
  "subject": "Help: cannot login to my account"
}
  Action: Verified user account active; reset password manually; user confirmed login restored.

- **[resolved]** sim=0.410 | [email:email.message.received] Integration with Salesforce not working

{
  "body_preview": "OAuth flow returns 403 invalid_grant after consent screen.",
  "from": "wave4-fixture@example.com",
  "received_at": "2026-04-29T21:39:07.612425Z",
  "subject": "Integration with Salesforce not working"
}
  Action: User had stale refresh token; revoked + re-authorized; integration green.

results.question: New Jira pentest ticket PT-4099: SQL injection in /api/login endpoint -- CVSS 9.1. Which similar Jira case and fix should be recalled?
